texto: In vain does the disguised traveller inwardly rebel against the influences and impressions which are wearing away his real self. The impressions of the past lose more and more their hold on him until they fade away, leaving the traveller hopelessly struggling in the toils of his own fiction, and the rôle he had assumed soon becomes second nature with him.
explicacao: Citação de Ármin Vámbéry sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “In vain does the disguised traveller inwardly rebel against the influences and impressions which …” articula reflexao, insight, traveller em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e reflexao.
